overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City downtown. The character navigates wet pedestrian plazas, crosses busy intersections with futuristic vehicles, and walks along streets lined with holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers under an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with holographic advertising

events.description: pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella passes close to camera, temporarily blocking view
approaching the wide intersection from the plaza, elevated highway becomes visible overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward the intersection, passing pedestrians with neon umbrellas

notable_agents.action: walking with a glowing blue umbrella, passing close to the camera

entered.detail: tall digital display showing animated neon graphics and text
multi-level orange-lit highway structure spanning across the street ahead
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and glass facades
tall palm trees lining the pedestrian plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, wet pedestrian plaza in a futuristic city. A holographic advertisement kiosk stands prominently on the right while palm trees line the walkway. The character walks toward a distant elevated highway overpass as dusk light mixes with neon illumination. Pedestrians with glowing umbrellas pass by, and the wet pavement reflects the surrounding lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with multi-lane traffic and overpass

events.description: waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass before continuing across the intersection
turning slightly left to navigate around pedestrians and align with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, weaving between pedestrians and navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car driving through the intersection
walking with a red glowing umbrella, crossing in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-story parking structure with distinctive green facade panels
large green holographic advertisement floating above the street level
concrete dividers separating the pedestrian walkway from vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The character enters a busy urban intersection beneath the looming elevated highway. The green parking garage dominates the left side while a large holographic billboard glows on the right. Futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection as the character navigates across the wet asphalt crosswalk, weaving through other pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street under elevated highway with commercial garages

events.description: entering the covered area directly beneath the elevated highway structure
purple futuristic sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing the NC Cleaning garage entrance and observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: purple futuristic sports car with glowing accents driving along the street

entered.detail: garage entrance with bright yellow neon NC CLEANING signage
construction-style yellow barriers lining the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway overpass, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed. The NC Cleaning garage entrance with its bright yellow neon sign appears on the left. Yellow traffic barriers line the right side of the sidewalk as futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet road. The concrete environment creates an urban canyon effect with reduced sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with storefronts and digital advertising

events.description: entering denser pedestrian area with increased neon signage and commercial activity
slight right turn to avoid group of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy commercial district, passing pedestrians with various glowing umbrellas and neon accessories

notable_agents.action: walking with a yellow glowing umbrella and dark coat

entered.detail: large building-mounted digital screens showing animated advertisements
commercial building entrances with bright neon signage and lighting
palm trees lining the sidewalk in the commercial district

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a denser commercial area, the street is lined with tall buildings featuring bright digital advertising screens and neon storefronts. Palm trees line the sidewalk as the character walks through moderate crowds carrying illuminated umbrellas. The lighting becomes predominantly neon-colored artificial light from the surrounding signage, creating a classic cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy futuristic city, transitioning from an open pedestrian plaza into a claustrophobic urban underpass before emerging into a dense commercial district. It begins in a wide, wet plaza where holographic kiosks and palm trees line the path toward a distant elevated highway under the dim light of dusk. As the character enters a busy intersection, the environment becomes more crowded with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, framed by a green parking garage and towering billboards. The scene then shifts into a darker, enclosed urban canyon beneath the massive highway overpass, where the bright yellow neon of a cleaning garage and concrete barriers dominate the narrow perspective. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a vibrant commercial area, where the lighting transforms into a saturated neon glow reflecting off the wet streets and digital advertising screens.
